span.p:
TextProcessor (2 configs):
1. BM25: lemmatize+no-stop
2. Proximity: raw+stopwords

span.p:
Final Score =
BM25 + title_boost + proximity_weight × prox_score

span.p:
Stage 2a: RRF Fusion (k=60)
BM25 + Proximity + Title ranks

span.p:
Stage 2b: MMR Diversity (λ=0.5)
Cosine similarity on BM25 TF vectors
